Use `with patch('urllib.request.urlopen', return_value=make_mock_response(b'{"ok":true}')) as mock_open:` — then call send_alert inside the with block.
After the with block, call `mock_open.assert_called_once()` to verify urlopen was called. Access the Request object with `mock_open.call_args[0][0]` and check `.full_url`.
For the JSON test: set the response body to `b'{"status": "ok"}'` and assert `result == {"status": "ok"}`.
For the invalid level test: no patching needed — just call send_alert('msg', 'critical') inside try/except ValueError. Add `assert False, 'should have raised'` right after the call.
